qEnglish: Tanya's salary is 33.33% more than that of Reema. By how much percent is Reema's salary less than that of Tanya's?
qHindi: तान्या का वेतन रीमा की तुलना में 33.33% अधिक है। रीमा का वेतन तान्या के वेतन से कितना प्रतिशत कम है ?
explanationEnglish: Tanya = 4/3 of Reema. Reema is less than Tanya by (1/4)*100 = 25%.
subject: गणित
